message.content:
I don’t have the text to summarize. Please paste the stable reference text (or share a link or title), and tell me how long you want the summary and what to focus on (main ideas, arguments, evidence, conclusions).

I can provide:
- A brief one-paragraph summary
- A concise 3–5 bullet-point outline of key points
- A 1–2 paragraph executive summary

Let me know your preferred length and focus.
